title: L69 - work_service_revalidation_results
description: Post-remediation verification results — validates whether remediation (L68) successfully resolved breach (L67). Compares pre/post metrics, determines if SLO is now compliant, and feeds learning feedback (L57) for continuous improvement.

breach_id.description: FK to L67 work_service_breaches (CASCADE on delete). Which breach was remediated.

remediation_plan_id.description: FK to L68 work_service_remediation_plans (CASCADE on delete). Remediation plan that was executed.

service_id.description: FK to L62 work_factory_services (RESTRICT on delete). Service that was remediated.

slo_id.description: FK to L66 work_service_level_objectives (RESTRICT on delete). SLO being revalidated.

measurement_window_hours.description: Measurement window used for revalidation (typically same as SLO)

metric_name.description: Which metric was revalidated (copied from SLO)

target_value.description: Target value for the metric (copied from SLO)

pre_remediation_value.description: Metric value before remediation (from breach record)

post_remediation_value.description: Metric value after remediation (measured during revalidation)

threshold_critical.description: Critical threshold (copied from SLO for reference)

passed.description: Whether service now meets SLO target (true = breach resolved, false = still non-compliant)

result_status.description: Revalidation outcome: fully_resolved (meets target), partially_resolved (better but not at target), no_improvement (same), degraded (worse)

sample_size.description: Number of service runs used for revalidation measurement

sample_run_ids.description: FK array to L64 work_service_runs. Sample runs used for measurement.

next_steps.description: Recommended next steps (e.g., 'Continue monitoring', 'Escalate to manual intervention', 'Apply pattern to other services')

learning_feedback_id.description: FK to L57 work_learning_feedback (SET_NULL). Learning captured from this remediation.

created_by.description: Identifier of creator (typically automated revalidation system)
